templates.description: Pluggable messaging fabric, switched to Garage for object store
Ontology extraction update, JSONL output from prompts
End-to-end provenance tracking and explainability across the knowledge pipeline — from document ingestion through extraction to query-time retrieval - every answer traceable to its source evidence
New agent orchestration engine, extended document processing to handle more document types include MS Office types

platforms.name: podman-compose

platforms.description: Uses docker-compose to deploy a compose file to a local Docker installation
